/home/gemini/Data/Code/vici/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/emar qc libbungee.a CMakeFiles/bungee_library.dir/src/Assert.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bungee_library.dir/src/Fourier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bungee_library.dir/src/Grain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bungee_library.dir/src/Grains.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bungee_library.dir/src/Input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bungee_library.dir/src/Instrumentation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bungee_library.dir/src/Output.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bungee_library.dir/src/Partials.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bungee_library.dir/src/Stretch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bungee_library.dir/src/Stretcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bungee_library.dir/src/Synthesis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bungee_library.dir/src/Timing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bungee_library.dir/src/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bungee_library.dir/src/version.cpp.o
